description: Use this API to look up the full address for a UK postcode. Includes an optional filter to narrow by house number and street name.

Use this API if you’re a tax agent who needs permission to act for a client. You can create new authorisation requests, check their status, cancel, or query existing requests. It replaces the paper 64-8 form.
For testing only. Use this endpoint to accept or reject an authorisation request created with the Agent Authorisation API.
Use this API to create dummy individual, agent and organisation accounts to test user‑restricted endpoints in the sandbox.
Set up test data to verify expected behaviour for the Breathing Space API.
Create, update and view Breathing Space periods. Use an individual’s NINO to get personal information about coded-out and current debts.
Use this API to list all businesses linked to an individual and retrieve additional information about each one
This API lets you search, view and manage property services related to business rates. It requires pre‑registration with the Valuation Office Agency (VOA)
This API allows you to check if an importer or exporter’s UK Economic Operator Registration and Identification (EORI) number is valid. It applies to numbers that begin with ‘GB’.
View and manage Construction Industry Scheme (CIS) deductions. Use this API to retrieve, create, remove or override information that CIS contractors have submitted to HMRC.
Use the Common Transit Convention (CTC) API to tell traders their guarantee funds balance.

The Common Transit Convention (CTC) API sends departure and arrival notifications to the New Computerised Transit System (NCTS). It also retrieves messages from departure and destination customs offices.

An API to submit Union Custom Code (UCC) Declarations for processing and approval by the Customs Declaration Service. It allows users to cancel a pre-request while in pre-clearance, and provides a route to securely upload additional documentation.
Use this API to search and get details of a Customs Declaration. Users can search based on role, category, date, goods location code and status.
Use this API to support the Inventory Linking Export process by controlling and monitoring cargo in transit. It covers three areas: consolidation, movement and query.
This API validates movement response messages provided by Community System Providers (CSP). It matches the outcome of a Declaration ID against an Inventory Consignment Reference (ICR).
An API to test email events including delivered, bounced, opened and clicked links.
Use this API to submit movement notices to the Excise Movement Control System (EMCS), view messages from EMCS and retrieve information about traders.
Provides a Shared Signals Framework to accept security related events to HMRC. The GDS signals are transmitted in the form of a Security Event Token (SET) which are signed and verified.
This API links declaration references, the movement of goods to declarations, and notifies users when their inbound goods have successfully cleared HMRC systems in the UK.
Use this API to create, update and delete Goods Movement Records (GMRs). It also lists active GMRs and notifies users when inbound goods have cleared UK HMRC systems.
Get Goods Movement Records (GRM) details that have embarked, arrived or checked-in for departure at a Goods Vehicle Movement Service (GVMS) border location. This API also gets GVMS reference data.

Find Goods Movement Records (GMR) for customs and transit declaration IDs, or Vehicle Registration Numbers. Get GVMS reference data and place inspection holds on GMRs moving on the Great Britain to Northern Ireland route.
This API gets questions from a set of identifiers and matches the user entered response.

Use this API to generate a list of Entry Summary Declaration (ENS) notifications, acknowledge them and retrieve their details. It helps you track ENS updates, confirm receipt and keep your safety and security processes accurate and up to date.

Use this API to list, retrieve and acknowledge Safety and Security Import Outcomes. It helps you track import processing results, confirm receipt and keep your safety and security submissions accurate and up to date.

Use this API to set up new Entry Summary Declaration (ENS) submissions and amend existing ones. It lets you create, update and manage ENS data so you can meet safety and security requirements before goods enter the UK
Use this API to submit presentation notifications for goods arriving in Northern Ireland, check inspection dates and tell Customs when goods do not need inspecting.
Use this API to get information about an employee’s or director’s benefits, as reported to HMRC by their employer. The data is used to pre‑populate an individual’s Self Assessment tax return.
Use this API to trigger, list, retrieve and submit a customer’s Self Assessment tax calculation.

Use this API to get employment information HMRC holds about an individual. It returns your employment history, the employer’s PAYE reference, the employer’s name and, when relevant, an off‑payroll work flag.
Use this API to access employment information. It returns employment history, the employer’s PAYE reference, the employer’s name and, where relevant, an off‑payroll work flag.
This API shares information HMRC holds including; employment history, employer PAYE reference, employer’s name and an off payroll work flag where applicable.
Use this API to manage financial data related to brought forward losses and loss claims.
Use this API to retrieve information HMRC holds about your tax affairs. It returns details such as tax deducted from your annual gross income, your pensions, incapacity benefit and any tax refunds.
Submit a declaration confirming the submission date for a business has completed.
Use this API to manage financial data for pension charges. You can use it to retrieve, create, update and delete pension charge records.
An API which allows agents to manage Child Benefit claims. Includes: get claimants relationships and details of their children, create a Child Benefit claim and match birth registration.
Use this API to manage data for marriage allowance and individual disclosures. You can use it to create, update, retrieve and delete these records.
Use this API to manage data for Trade Union income, Patent Royalties and existing employment expenses. You can use it to create, update, retrieve and delete these records.

For testing only. Create dummy user details, PAYE, benefits and credits test data for an individual. This API will also create self assessment, corporation tax, VAT and multiple employee test data for an organisation.
Get information about an individual's income from employment, pensions and retirement annuities and other state benefits or grants.
Get HMRC records to find out information about an individual.
Use this API to manage data for relief from investments and subscriptions. You can use it to create, update, retrieve and delete these records.
Use this API to manage information about your State Benefits. You can use it to create, update and retrieve State Benefit records
Allow 3rd-party supplies to submit scanned copies of VAT returns for insolvent companies.
This API calculates the interest accrued to one or multiple customer debts. It retrieves configurable information including the interest rates applied, and a debt calculation.
This API lets a Reporting Company appoint or revoke its access to submit Interest Restriction Returns (IRR). It also enables the company to submit full or abbreviated IRR returns through its software
An API that checks if users are authorised to create and retrieve session data.

This API lets providers create and manage Lifetime ISA (LISA) accounts. It handles requests for event details, transfers, withdrawals and debt information so software can keep LISA records accurate and up to date
This API lets software get a user’s marriage allowance status and check if they are eligible to claim or transfer it.
This API lets you create test data for the Marriage Allowance API.
Send a single or multiple events to the tax platform for auditing.
Get details of the Help to Save account for HMRC Mobile app.
Get a metadata list of all the user's digital messages such as Digital Contact or Online Letters from HMRC.
Get PAYE data in a defined format for HMRC Mobile App developers.
A calling system to send push notifications to the HMRC mobile app.
Register iOS and Android devices for push notifications. Used by HMRC Mobile App developers.
Get startup data to initialise mobile apps. This API uses an authentication token to identify the National Insurance Number (NINO) to identify the user.
Submit tax credits renewal information.
Get tax credits summary information.
Submits user feedback from HMRC Mobile app when a feedback submission is added to the queue.

Use this API to get test support for MTD Self Assessment APIs. It lets you create test scenarios, validate integrations and check your software so you can develop and verify your MTD SA journeys with confidence.
Use this API to view earnings that are subject to National Insurance and the payments due. It is mainly used to calculate a taxpayer’s National Insurance liability within Self Assessment.
Use this API to set up test data for the National Insurance API.
Get a National Insurance record summary and tax year details.
Check national insurance numbers insights from Customer Insight Platform.
Use this API to retrieve obligations for business income sources, final declaration and the End of Period Statement.
This API allows 3rd-party providers to update HMRC on the status of Open Banking payments.
Use this API to create, amend, retrieve and delete deductions. It helps you manage deduction records accurately so your software can keep taxpayer information up to date.
Use this API to set up test data for the Individual PAYE APIs. It lets you create and manage test records for individual benefits, individual employment, individual income and individual tax.
This API allows 3rd-parties to check if a payment card is valid for use with a given tax regime, and reports applicable surcharges.
Send charge reference information to ETMP via DES and update the tps-payments-backend mongo repository with the information received.
Use this API to manage UK, Foreign, Historic and Non‑Furnished Holiday Let (FHL) submissions and summaries.
Use this API to send (push) and get (pull) notifications automatically.
Use this service to check a pension scheme member’s residency for tax purposes and make relief at source claims.
This API lists the files available to download through the Secure Data Exchange Service (SDES) and provides a URL for each download.
Notify users that a bulk file transfer in the Secure Data Exchange Service is ready for processing or complete.
Use this API to create URLs for uploading one or multiple files to HMRC’s Secure Data Exchange Service (SDES). You can use it with Web Forms.
Use this API to retrieve a customer’s overall liability, broken down into overdue, payable and pending amounts.
Use this API to generate the HMRC Assist Report. It lets you submit quarterly updates, annual updates and submit a final declaration report.
Retrieve a summary of income and expenses for a specific self‑employment or property business.

An API that provides access to Business Source Adjustable Summary (BSAS) calculations for self‑employment or property businesses. Use it to generate lists, request or provide a BSAS, and submit adjustments.

Use this API to perform operations related to Individuals and other taxable entities for Income Tax Self Assessment. You can create, update and retrieve the information you need so you can keep Self Assessment records accurate and up-to-date.
Use this API to manage annual and period summaries and submissions for self‑employment.
Get a link to a web-session for the current API user.
Use this API to send a browser link containing a session info ID.
For the Department of Work and Pensions (DWP) only. Calculate an individual’s state pension.
An API to generate a customers’ statement of liability.

This API verifies a user’s identity through a telephony system by checking personal information including partner’s date of birth, bank account number or previous postcode. It logs whether the attempt was successful or failed.
Create individual, VAT trader, employer entities that can be accessed using the Telephony Identity Verification API. For use in the sandbox environment.
Use this API to generate or promote a Time To Pay (TTP) request, get or update existing TTP plans, and return affordable quotes.
Use this API to check the value and format of fraud‑prevention headers on individual requests.
Use this API to manage VAT reporting. You can submit and view VAT returns, and retrieve information about liabilities, payments, penalties and obligations.
This API checks the registration and company details for UK VAT numbers. It also generates a reference to confirm that a check has been made.
